meta_title: BCSentinel — Data Health Monitoring for Business Central
meta_description: Detect data issues in Microsoft Dynamics 365 Business Central, quantify financial impact, and monitor data health continuously with BCSentinel.
brand_sub_top: Data Health Monitoring For Business Central 365
brand_sub_footer: Data quality and business impact for Business Central
hero_title: Your Business Central data is costing you money.
hero_text: Detect data issues, quantify financial impact, and monitor your ERP health continuously — before poor data slows processes, creates rework, and drives avoidable losses.
hero_point_1: Deep scan of your Business Central data
hero_point_2: Realistic annual loss and savings potential
hero_point_3: Continuous monitoring for critical data issues
problem_title: Most Business Central systems contain hidden data issues.
problem_text: Missing master data, duplicate records, wrong prices, incomplete posting setups, and unresolved open documents quietly create friction across sales, purchasing, finance, and operations.
problem_check_1: Missing customer, vendor, or item details
problem_check_2: Incorrect prices, discounts, or posting setups
problem_check_4: Open documents and ledger issues blocking processes
problem_card_1_text: Incomplete master data leads to manual work, follow-ups, and delays.
problem_card_2_text: Incorrect sales prices and purchase data directly affect margin and trust.
problem_card_3_text: Multiple inconsistent records create reporting errors and broken workflows.
problem_card_4_text: Open documents and setup gaps slow teams down and delay decisions.
impact_title: Bad data is not just annoying. It is expensive.
impact_card_1_title: Wrong prices and discounts reduce margin.
impact_card_2_title: Teams spend time fixing avoidable data errors.
impact_card_3_title: Incomplete setups block transactions and approvals.
impact_card_4_title: Low-quality data distorts reports and KPIs.
solution_title: BCSentinel turns poor data into measurable clarity.
solution_text: Run a full scan of your Business Central system and instantly see where your data quality is weak, how big the business impact is, and which areas deserve attention first.
solution_check_1: Data Health Score for an immediate overview
steps_title: From first scan to clear action in three steps.
step_1_text: Start directly from your Business Central environment and launch your first scan.
step_2_text: Free and Premium use the same scan base so your results are realistic from day one.
step_3_text: Get a score, business impact, and issue overview — then unlock actions with Premium.
value_title: See what poor data costs — and what fixing it can save.
value_panel_1_text: Monetized impact based on your detected data issues.
value_panel_2_text: Transparent pricing based on your current data volume.
value_panel_3_text: Estimated realistic savings after addressing key issues.
pricing_title: Insight is free. Action is Premium.
pricing_premium_feature_5: Clear upgrade path from insight to execution
security_title: Built for privacy-sensitive Business Central environments.
security_text: BCSentinel is designed to support privacy-first SaaS usage and to create trust in sensitive ERP contexts.
security_panel_text: Hosted in Germany, designed for GDPR-conscious businesses, and built with a focus on secure processing, tenant separation, and minimal exposure of sensitive ERP information.
faq_1_answer: BCSentinel scans your Business Central data quality across key areas such as customers, vendors, items, finance, purchasing, sales, and process-related records.
faq_2_question: What is included in the Free plan?
faq_2_answer: The Free plan includes the full scan basis, a Data Health Score, issue categories, counts, and monetized impact visibility.
faq_3_answer: Premium unlocks record-level details, recommendations, prioritization, and action-oriented issue handling directly in Business Central.
faq_4_answer: Yes. BCSentinel is designed for GDPR-conscious use and can be hosted on a German server to support privacy and compliance requirements.
cta_title: See what your Business Central data is costing you before it gets more expensive.
cta_text: Start your free scan, uncover hidden risks, and get a business-focused view of where weak data quality is already creating avoidable cost.
cta_note: No commitment. Immediate insight. Upgrade when you want action.
